business_id.description: ID of the business this transaction belongs to

description.description: Plain language description of the transaction

original_amount.description: Original transaction amount in foreign currency

original_currency.description: Original currency code (e.g., EUR, GBP, JPY)

exchange_rate.description: Exchange rate used for conversion (foreign to base)

amount.description: Transaction amount in base currency (after conversion)

is_cleared.description: Whether this transaction has cleared the bank

reference_number.description: Check number, invoice number, or other reference

is_deleted.description: Soft delete flag - never hard delete transactions
